item.title: Reliance Industries Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 6 Apr 2026
item.description: Reliance Industries Ltd experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 1,312, reflecting a 2.88% drop as the stock faced significant price pressure amid broader market weakness and sectoral downturns. Time: 3 minutes ago

item.title: Suryavanshi Spinning Mills Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 16.55 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: A sharp decline has pushed Suryavanshi Spinning Mills Ltd to a fresh 52-week low of Rs 16.55 on 6 Apr 2026, marking a significant 41.9% drop from its 52-week high of Rs 28.49. This downturn comes amid a broader market retreat, but the stock's underperformance far exceeds that of the Sensex, which itself is nearing a 52-week low. Time: 11 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts DC Infotech & Communication Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 351.85
item.description: With a decisive surge to Rs 351.85 on 6 Apr 2026, DC Infotech & Communication Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week high, marking a 73% rally from its low of Rs 203 in the past year. This milestone is underscored by a confluence of technical indicators signalling strong momentum despite a broadly subdued market backdrop. Time: 11 minutes ago

item.title: Symbiox Investment & Trading Co Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 1.36 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: A sharp decline in Symbiox Investment & Trading Co Ltd has pushed the stock to a fresh 52-week low of Rs 1.36 on 6 Apr 2026, extending its downward trajectory amid broader market weakness and company-specific concerns. Time: 12 minutes ago

item.title: Five Consecutive Losses Push Impex Ferro Tech Ltd to a New 52-Week Low
item.description: For the fifth straight session, Impex Ferro Tech Ltd closed lower, breaching its 52-week low at Rs 1.31 on 6 Apr 2026, marking a cumulative decline of 9.03% over this period amid sector gains and broader market volatility. Time: 12 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Rekvina Labs Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 38.35
item.description: With a sustained rally over the past 15 trading sessions, Rekvina Labs Ltd has surged to a fresh 52-week high of Rs 38.35 on 6 Apr 2026, marking a remarkable 33.34% gain during this period. This price milestone is underscored by a confluence of bullish technical indicators that highlight strong momentum despite a broadly weakening market backdrop. Time: 12 minutes ago

item.title: Cranes Software International Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 3.21 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: For the fifth consecutive session, Cranes Software International Ltd closed lower, hitting a fresh 52-week low of Rs 3.21 on 6 Apr 2026, marking a significant decline from its 52-week high of Rs 6.01. This persistent downtrend has intensified despite the stock outperforming its sector by 1.73% on the day, underscoring the depth of selling pressure weighing on the micro-cap software company. Time: 12 minutes ago

item.title: Camex Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 26.37 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: For the second consecutive session, Camex Ltd has seen its share price decline sharply, hitting a fresh 52-week low of Rs 26.37 on 6 Apr 2026. This latest drop extends the stock’s downward trajectory, which has now erased nearly 28% of its value over the past year, significantly underperforming the broader market indices. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Integrated Proteins Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 77.19
item.description: Surging to a new 52-week high of Rs 77.19 on 6 Apr 2026, Integrated Proteins Ltd has demonstrated remarkable price momentum, rallying over 61% in the past 14 trading sessions. This milestone comes amid a broader market environment where the Sensex is retreating, underscoring the stock’s distinctive technical strength. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Shantai Industries Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 60.18
item.description: Surging past Rs 60.18, Shantai Industries Ltd has marked a remarkable milestone by hitting a fresh 52-week high on 6 Apr 2026, propelled by a sustained rally that has delivered over 51% returns in the past 21 trading days alone. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Oxford Industries Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 13.4
item.description: Surging to a fresh 52-week high of Rs 13.4 on 6 Apr 2026, Oxford Industries Ltd has demonstrated remarkable price momentum, extending gains for 16 consecutive sessions and delivering a 36.32% return during this period. This rally stands out amid a broadly bearish market backdrop, underscoring the stock’s technical resilience and strong upward trajectory. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Markets Rally, But Syngene International Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: While broader indices have shown signs of recovery, Syngene International Ltd has continued its downward trajectory, hitting a fresh 52-week low of Rs 380 on 6 Apr 2026. This decline comes amid a backdrop of mixed financial signals and persistent underperformance relative to the market. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Covidh Technologies Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 58.52
item.description: With a remarkable 51.25% gain over the past 21 trading sessions, Covidh Technologies Ltd surged to a fresh 52-week high of Rs 58.52 today, defying the broader market's recent weakness and signalling robust price momentum backed by a suite of bullish technical indicators. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: V-Mart Retail Ltd. Surges 10.04% to Day's High of Rs 601.65 — Outperforms Sector by 9.2 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined 0.54% on 06 Apr 2026 while V-Mart Retail Ltd. surged 10.04%, marking a remarkable 9.2-percentage-point outperformance over its Diversified Retail sector peers. This sharp intraday rally stands out amid a broadly weak market, signalling a stock-specific momentum shift rather than a general market uplift. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Lux Industries Ltd Surges 8.22% to Day's High of Rs 976 — Outperforms Sector by 8.13 Percentage Points
item.description: While the Sensex declined 0.54% on 6 Apr 2026, Lux Industries Ltd surged 8.22%, reaching an intraday high of Rs 976. This 8.13 percentage-point outperformance over its Garments & Apparels sector peers highlights a distinctly stock-specific rally amid a broadly weak market backdrop. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Adani Green Energy Ltd Surges 4.32% to Day's High of Rs 894.5 — Outperforms Power Sector by 3.68 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined 0.49% on 6 Apr 2026, while Adani Green Energy Ltd rallied 4.32%, touching an intraday high of Rs 894.5. That 3.68-percentage-point outperformance over the Power sector signals a stock-specific strength amid a broadly weak market environment. Time: 32 minutes ago

item.title: Markets Rally, But Univa Foods Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Despite a broader market rally, Univa Foods Ltd has slipped to a fresh 52-week low of Rs 7.87, marking a continuation of its downward trajectory amid sectoral and company-specific pressures. Time: 35 minutes ago

item.title: Educomp Solutions Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 0.91 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: Educomp Solutions Ltd’s stock price declined to a fresh 52-week low of Rs.0.91 on 6 April 2026, reflecting ongoing pressures from subdued financial performance and market conditions. The stock’s recent movement underscores persistent challenges faced by the company within the Other Consumer Services sector. Time: 36 minutes ago

item.title: Markets Rally, But Studds Accessories Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Studds Accessories Ltd’s stock price declined to a fresh 52-week low of Rs.441 on 6 April 2026, marking a significant price level for the diversified consumer products company amid broader market weakness. Time: 36 minutes ago

item.title: Nivaka Fashions Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 1.29 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: A sharp decline over four consecutive sessions has dragged Nivaka Fashions Ltd to a fresh 52-week low of Rs 1.29 on 6 Apr 2026, marking a 17.31% loss in this period and a staggering 65.60% drop over the past year. Time: 36 minutes ago

item.title: {{list.post_title}}
